subcodes.first_line: O scion of that glorious personage! Thy letter and verse, both of which were received, are eloquent and articulate, novel and pleasing [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای سلیله آن شخص جلیل نامه با چکامه هر دو وارد فصیح است و بلیغ بدیع است و ملیح
subcodes.subjects: @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @love of God, @consolation and comfort, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
